overview: A shared household meal planning app with an ingredient library, recipe management with photo uploads, a 7-day meal planner grid, and an auto-generated smart shopping cart — all running on the Internet Computer with no login required.
features: Ingredient library with preset and custom categories
Recipe management with image uploads, step-by-step or free-text instructions, tags, favorites, and search
7-day meal planner grid (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner) with week navigation and recipe picker
Auto-generated shopping cart with smart quantity merging, category grouping, and persistent checklist
Dark mode default with light mode toggle
Mobile-first design with bottom tab navigation on iPhone
Shared household data — no accounts or login required
